stemHtml: A crew calculate landing speeds for a full flap landing (30°) but, due to distraction, omit to extend flaps further than the approach setting (15°). Which of the following statements is correct assuming the correct glidepath was flown to touchdown?

options.a: Landing distance available may be insufficient and a tail strike is more likely.
options.b: Aircraft attitude on the glideslope will be lower than expected.
options.c: Thrust setting on the approach will be higher than expected.
options.d: There is less risk of a runway overrun.
